Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Apr-06-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Patricia VanSteenberge.
Frederick Roesti, Esq. for Plaintiff: Klaus Zimmermann, also present, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Soyoltulga Baasanjav.
Matter is taken under submission for review, Proposed Judgement submitted in court.

Apr. 6, 2007
Judgment granted as follows:
Damages $29,000.00
Prejudgment Interest $13,775.00
Attorney Fees $1,450.00
Costs $725.50, for a Total of $44,950.50
Judgment signed by Comm. Kaplan.
